---
title: "crawler.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\crawler.ts"
loc: 49
complexity: 4
logic_score: 8.00
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 6.08
overall_score: 5.00
---

## Intent
The `intel.ts` module calculates the 'Intelligence Score' (I) of a file. It evaluates the presence and quality of agentic metadata, such as the AI-generated intent and interaction protocol, ensuring that every module in the repository has a clear purpose and defined usage pattern.

## Interaction Protocol
Pass the `FileData` object to the `calculateIntelScore` function. It assesses the depth and semantic quality of the 'Lore' associated with the file and returns the corresponding intelligence metric.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 24 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [*](file://node:fs)

### Exports
- `crawlRepository`
- `crawlRepository`
- `allowedExtensions`
- `bloatPatterns`
- `execa`
- `files`
- `ext`
- `isBloat`
